videos.headline: Washington survives Texas' final drive to win Sugar Bowl
videos.description: After time is put back on the clock, Texas QB Quinn Ewers' pass to Adonai Mitchell falls incomplete and the Washington Huskies hang on to win the Sugar Bowl.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Washington survives Texas' final drive to win Sugar Bowl) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'Lynn Polk's 77-yard catch sets up Washington TD
videos.description: Michael Penix Jr. connects with Ja'Lynn Polk for a 77-yard gain, leading to a Dillon Johnson score for Washington.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Ja'Lynn Polk's 77-yard catch sets up Washington TD) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas responds on Jaydon Blue's TD run
videos.description: Jaydon Blue gets the handoff and powers into the end zone for a Texas touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas responds on Jaydon Blue's TD run) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Germie Bernard makes leaping grab for Washington
videos.description: Washington QB Michael Penix Jr. lobs a 29-yard pass to Germie Bernard, who makes a leaping catch.

videos.headline: Dillon Johnson scores 2nd TD of game for the Huskies
videos.description: Washington RB Dillon Johnson waltzes into the end zone for his second rushing score of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Johnson scores 2nd TD of game for the Huskies) 2024/0/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas takes over after Washington muffs punt
videos.description: Washington's Germie Bernard muffs the punt and the Texas Longhorns take over.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Big man TD! Byron Murphy II punches it in for Texas) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Rome Odunze makes over-the-shoulder grab for Washington

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Rome Odunze makes over-the-shoulder grab for Washington) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Texas stops Washington's attempt on 4th down
videos.description: Washington RB Dillon Johnson takes the handoff on fourth down, but gets stopped as Texas takes over.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas stops Washington's attempt on 4th down) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

videos.headline: Ja'Lynn Polk makes bobbling TD catch and Washington goes ahead

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Texas ties the score after CJ Baxter's TD run) 2024/01/01 ESHEET

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Penix threads the needle to McMillan for Washington score) 2024/01/01 ESHEET
